texto: In our desire to impose form on the world and our lives we have lost the capacity to see the form that is already there; and in that lies not liberation but alienation, the cutting off of things as they really are.
explicacao: Citação de Colin E. Gunton sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “In our desire to impose form on the world and our lives we have lost the capacity to see the form…” articula vida, anthropology, creation em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e creation.

frase_original: In our desire to impose form on the world and our lives we have lost the capacity to see the form that is already there; and in that lies not liberation but alienation, the cutting off of things as they really are.

texto: An attempt to wrest from God the prerogatives of absolute freedom and infinity leads to the inversion of Pentecost and what is in effect a new Babel. 'Postmodernism' represents that Babel perfectly, because when each speaks a language unrelated to that of the other - when language is not the basis of the communication that shapes our being - the only outcome can be fragmentation. In that sense, postmodernism is modernity come home to roost.
explicacao: Citação de Colin E. Gunton sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “An attempt to wrest from God the prerogatives of absolute freedom and infinity leads to the inver…” articula lideranca, babel, fragmentation em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como fragmentation e god.
